About

Grounded in the data, built for stakeholders.

I work across the full analytics loop — pulling and cleaning data with Python and SQL, exploring it until the real pattern shows up, and packaging the answer into a dashboard or model someone outside the data team can actually use.

Recent internships had me improving reporting reliability at Avijo and automating dashboard workflows at Infosys Springboard, while side projects pushed further into machine learning: from revenue forecasting to a deployed wine-quality classifier.
